summary.note: There are 25 total commercial acquisition objects shown here: 17 core packages, 1 KYA Ready Pack™, and 7 advanced infrastructure services / enterprise accelerators. ECZ-ID Insurability Readiness™ is a derived add-on and is not counted as a package.

corePackages.name: ECZ Core Resolve Gate

corePackages.idealFor: Foundational identity resolution. Establishes resolver presence with identity continuity built in.
